cards.basicText: Discard 1 card from the top of your deck. All opposing heroes in your zone take damage equal to the BOOST value of that card. Gingerbread man recovers health equal to the BOOST value.
cards.title: the way the cookie crumbles

cards.basicText:
Choose 2 cards from your discard pile and place them back in your deck. Shuffle your deck. 
(You may not choose scheme cards.)
cards.title: Changing the recipe

cards.afterText: Your opponent may discard any ammount of cards. For each card they have in their hand, they take 1 damage.

cards.duringText: Decrease your opponent's card value in half rounded down.
cards.title: Cookie cutter

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, you may draw 1 card.
cards.title: Gingerbread house

cards.afterText: If Gingerbread man is not adjacent to Fox, draw 1 card and Gingerbread man recovers 1 health.
cards.title: Ginger snap

cards.afterText: Move Gingerbread man up to 2 spaces.
cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Can't catch me...

cards.afterText: If Fox started this turn adjacent to Gingerbread man, deal 2 damage to the opposing fighter.
cards.title: Sweet tooth

cards.duringText: If you are adjacent to Gingerbread man, you may BOOST this card.
cards.title: Snatch and Devour

cards.afterText: Move your fighter up to 4 spaces.
cards.title: Swift Strike

cards.afterText: If Gingerbread man and Fox are adjacent, gain 1 action.
cards.title: Working together

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 4 spaces.
cards.title: Leap away

hero.name: gingerbread man
hero.specialAbility:
FRESH OUT OF THE OVEN
Gingerbread man may maneuver through spaces containing opposing fighters.
At the end of your turn, if Fox is adjacent to Gingerbread man, Gingerbread man takes 1 damage.
hero.quote: Fresh out of the oven and impossible to pin down — he runs straight through enemy lines, always one step ahead of the Fox snapping at his heels.

sidekick.name: Fox
sidekick.quote: Helpful, patient, and always hungry — best stay out of reach of those jaws.

name: Gingerbread man
note:
If you like this deck check out my Raven deck. 
It also have custom art and is finished, balanced, and flow as I wanted.

Gingerbread man has a movement of 4 so it can be really hard to catch him. (Go figure) 😁 With Gingerbread man you have to be careful about where you place the Fox. At the end of your turn if you are adjacent to Fox you will end up taking damage but sometimes for Fox to be used at full potential you have to be next to Gingerbread man. Is Fox going to help you win, or will he only aid in your demise? Don't be fooled by his cute card art though because Gingerbread man is one tough cookie!
